title: Small test order
description: Small quantity, test-market intent — buyer probing prices for a first deal with this seller. Demonstrates the legacy single-dim baseline behavior on a multi-dim intent. Useful as a quick smoke test.

expectedOutcome.likely: At low qty, seller's bulk pricing yields a higher floor (~₹700+). Will likely escalate — useful to demonstrate that small orders are price-inelastic in this product config.
expectedOutcome.possible: If seller's per-unit math doesn't kick in at this scale, may close near buyer cap.
expectedOutcome.failureMode: Demonstrates the volume-pricing math: same product+budget but qty=500 vs qty=100k produces very different floors. Useful for showing why quantity matters in agent reasoning.

declaredButDeferred: sellerIntent (entirely — seller acts on its own .env config)
